name: higher-order
description: Higher-order reasoning, decision, planning, design, and writing skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Reasoning guardrails for stronger agent work.
interface.longDescription: Higher Order packages reusable Codex skills for scoping work, defining success, narrowing decisions, writing deterministic implementation guidance, structuring projects, and reviewing UI design without adding runtime command enforcement.
defaultPrompt: Define success before implementing this change.
Think through these options with explicit constraints.
